name: Resend
description: Email API for developers. Send transactional and marketing emails, manage contacts, domains, templates, broadcasts, and webhooks.

capabilities.name: emails_send
capabilities.description: Send an email to one or more recipients with HTML, text, attachments, and scheduling support.

capabilities.name: emails_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of sent emails.

capabilities.name: emails_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single email by its ID.

capabilities.name: emails_update
capabilities.description: Update a scheduled email's send time.

capabilities.name: emails_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel the scheduled sending of an email.

capabilities.name: emails_batch
capabilities.description: Send up to 100 emails in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: emails_attachments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve attachments for a sent email.

capabilities.name: emails_attachments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single attachment from a sent email.

capabilities.name: receiving_emails_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of received emails.

capabilities.name: receiving_emails_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single received email by ID.

capabilities.name: receiving_emails_attachments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve attachments for a received email.

capabilities.name: receiving_emails_attachments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single attachment from a received email.

capabilities.name: domains_create
capabilities.description: Create a new sending domain.

capabilities.name: domains_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all sending domains.

capabilities.name: domains_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single domain by ID.

capabilities.name: domains_update
capabilities.description: Update a domain's tracking settings.

capabilities.name: domains_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an existing domain.

capabilities.name: domains_verify
capabilities.description: Verify an existing domain's DNS records.

capabilities.name: api_keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new API key.

capabilities.name: api_keys_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all API keys.

capabilities.name: api_keys_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an existing API key.

capabilities.name: templates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new email template.

capabilities.name: templates_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all templates.

capabilities.name: templates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single template by ID or alias.

capabilities.name: templates_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing template.

capabilities.name: templates_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an existing template.

capabilities.name: templates_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a template to make it available for sending.

capabilities.name: templates_duplicate
capabilities.description: Duplicate an existing template.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of contacts with optional segment filtering.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single contact by ID or email.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update a contact by ID or email.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a contact by ID or email.

capabilities.name: contacts_segments_list
capabilities.description: List segments a contact belongs to.

capabilities.name: contacts_segments_add
capabilities.description: Add a contact to a segment.

capabilities.name: contacts_segments_remove
capabilities.description: Remove a contact from a segment.

capabilities.name: contacts_topics_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve topic subscriptions for a contact.

capabilities.name: contacts_topics_update
capabilities.description: Update topic subscriptions for a contact.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new broadcast email campaign.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all broadcasts.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single broadcast by ID.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing broadcast.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a draft broadcast.

capabilities.name: broadcasts_send
capabilities.description: Send or schedule a broadcast for delivery.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook endpoint.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an existing webhook.

capabilities.name: segments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact segment.

capabilities.name: segments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all segments.

capabilities.name: segments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single segment by ID.

capabilities.name: segments_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an existing segment.

capabilities.name: topics_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscription topic.

capabilities.name: topics_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all topics.

capabilities.name: topics_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single topic by ID.

capabilities.name: topics_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing topic.

capabilities.name: topics_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an existing topic.

capabilities.name: contact_properties_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom contact property.

capabilities.name: contact_properties_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all contact properties.

capabilities.name: contact_properties_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single contact property by ID.

capabilities.name: contact_properties_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing contact property.

capabilities.name: contact_properties_delete
capabilities.description: Remove an existing contact property.
